query:
SELECT 'users' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM users
UNION ALL SELECT 'teams_webhooks', COUNT(*) FROM teams_webhooks
UNION ALL SELECT 'alert_rules', COUNT(*) FROM alert_rules
UNION ALL SELECT 'alert_history', COUNT(*) FROM alert_history
UNION ALL SELECT 'scheduled_summary', COUNT(*) FROM scheduled_summary
UNION ALL SELECT 'clover_connections', COUNT(*) FROM clover_connections
UNION ALL SELECT 'clover_daily_sales', COUNT(*) FROM clover_daily_sales
UNION ALL SELECT 'clover_shifts', COUNT(*) FROM clover_shifts
UNION ALL SELECT 'seven_shifts_connections', COUNT(*) FROM seven_shifts_connections
UNION ALL SELECT 'seven_shifts_daily_sales', COUNT(*) FROM seven_shifts_daily_sales
UNION ALL SELECT 'excel_labour_data', COUNT(*) FROM excel_labour_data
UNION ALL SELECT 'excel_sync_meta', COUNT(*) FROM excel_sync_meta
UNION ALL SELECT 'report_submissions', COUNT(*) FROM report_submissions
UNION ALL SELECT 'store_pins', COUNT(*) FROM store_pins
UNION ALL SELECT 'position_pins', COUNT(*) FROM position_pins
UNION ALL SELECT 'expense_categories', COUNT(*) FROM expense_categories
UNION ALL SELECT 'vendors', COUNT(*) FROM vendors
UNION ALL SELECT 'expenses', COUNT(*) FROM expenses
UNION ALL SELECT 'cogs_targets', COUNT(*) FROM cogs_targets
UNION ALL SELECT 'inventory_items', COUNT(*) FROM inventory_items
UNION ALL SELECT 'inventory_counts', COUNT(*) FROM inventory_counts;
